'''ân-zh-s''' ('''kanazhas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:telish|telish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:telish|telish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-zh-s
|-
! Lemma
| kanazhas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinazhas|thinazhas]] || [[word:jinazhas|jinazhas]] || [[word:shinazhas|shinazhas]] || [[word:kinazhas|kinazhas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunazhas|thuthunazhas]] || [[word:jujunazhas|jujunazhas]] || [[word:shushunazhas|shushunazhas]] || [[word:kukunazhas|kukunazhas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunazhas|thunazhas]] || [[word:junazhas|junazhas]] || [[word:shunazhas|shunazhas]] || [[word:kunazhas|kunazhas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunazhas|thunazhas]] || [[word:junazhas|junazhas]] || [[word:shunazhas|shunazhas]] || [[word:kunazhas|kunazhas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenazhas|thenazhas]] || [[word:jenazhas|jenazhas]] || [[word:shenazhas|shenazhas]] || [[word:kenazhas|kenazhas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonazhas|thothonazhas]] || [[word:jojonazhas|jojonazhas]] || [[word:shoshonazhas|shoshonazhas]] || [[word:kokonazhas|kokonazhas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonazhas|thonazhas]] || [[word:jonazhas|jonazhas]] || [[word:shonazhas|shonazhas]] || [[word:konazhas|konazhas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonazhas|thonazhas]] || [[word:jonazhas|jonazhas]] || [[word:shonazhas|shonazhas]] || [[word:konazhas|konazhas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnazhas|thĂŠnazhas]] || [[word:jĂŠnazhas|jĂŠnazhas]] || [[word:shĂŠnazhas|shĂŠnazhas]] || [[word:kĂŠnazhas|kĂŠnazhas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanazhas|thathanazhas]] || [[word:jajanazhas|jajanazhas]] || [[word:shashanazhas|shashanazhas]] || [[word:kakanazhas|kakanazhas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanazhas|thanazhas]] || [[word:janazhas|janazhas]] || [[word:shanazhas|shanazhas]] || [[word:kanazhas|kanazhas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanazhas|thanazhas]] || [[word:janazhas|janazhas]] || [[word:shanazhas|shanazhas]] || [[word:kanazhas|kanazhas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanazhas|shanazhas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanazhas|goshanazhas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanazhas|gokishanazhas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanazhasnĂŒ|shanazhasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanazhasnknĂŒ|goshanazhasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazhasnĂŒ|gokishanazhasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanazhashĂ«|shanazhashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkshĂ«|goshanazhasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanazhashĂ«|gokishanazhashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazhasro|shanazhasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkro|goshanazhasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazhasro|gokishanazhasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazhasmu|shanazhasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkmu|goshanazhasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazhasmu|gokishanazhasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanazhasher|shanazhasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanazhasnksher|goshanazhasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanazhasher|gokishanazhasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanazhasng|shanazhasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkng|goshanazhasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanazhasng|gokishanazhasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanazhasya|shanazhasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkya|goshanazhasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanazhasya|gokishanazhasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanazhasyam|shanazhasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkyam|goshanazhasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanazhasyam|gokishanazhasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazhasnĂŒshĂ«|shanazhasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazhasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanazhasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazhasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanazhasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazhasnĂŒro|shanazhasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazhasnknĂŒro|goshanazhasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazhasnĂŒro|gokishanazhasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazhasnĂŒmu|shanazhasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazhasnknĂŒmu|goshanazhasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazhasnĂŒmu|gokishanazhasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazhashĂ«nĂŒ|shanazhashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanazhasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazhashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanazhashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazhashĂ«ro|shanazhashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkshĂ«ro|goshanazhasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazhashĂ«ro|gokishanazhashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazhashĂ«mu|shanazhashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkshĂ«mu|goshanazhasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazhashĂ«mu|gokishanazhashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazhasronĂŒ|shanazhasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkronĂŒ|goshanazhasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazhasronĂŒ|gokishanazhasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazhasroshĂ«|shanazhasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkroshĂ«|goshanazhasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazhasroshĂ«|gokishanazhasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazhasromu|shanazhasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkromu|goshanazhasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazhasromu|gokishanazhasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazhasmunĂŒ|shanazhasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkmunĂŒ|goshanazhasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazhasmunĂŒ|gokishanazhasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazhasmushĂ«|shanazhasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkmushĂ«|goshanazhasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazhasmushĂ«|gokishanazhasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazhasmuro|shanazhasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazhasnkmuro|goshanazhasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazhasmuro|gokishanazhasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
